descript.abstract: This data is intended for read-only use. Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF) data from surface ownership fund table is attached to surface ownership to create a base layer that is used in Forest Service business functions, as well as by other entities such as states, counties, other agencies, and partners. This layer depicts only the Forest Service lands that are acquired through purchase, exchange, donation, and transfer that used LWCF-designated funds. It is not a complete representation of all Forest Service land acquisitions; only those that used LWCF-designated funds.
descript.purpose: This data is intended for read-only use. This layer is Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF) funded lands from the Forest Service to the Trust for Public Lands (TPL). This layer combines data from surface ownership and the surface ownership fund table into the TPL data schema. This data will be available through a web map developed by TPL that will also include other LWCF funded projects (tplgis.org).

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

dataqual.logic: LSRS data is maintained through the NRM LSRS Editor Application. Data quality is ensured through regional implementation of quality assurance levels, recommened practices, QA reports generated from database queries, and topology checks. Quality control measures taken: this feature class is populated by an automated translation process from the source feature class that is edited and maintained by the data stewards. Only stewards with proper role grants can edit the data. The application used for editing has built in controls to only allow valid geometry and domains to control attribute integrity.
dataqual.complete: Data is complete as of publication.

horizpa.horizpar: Generally the source information used to record spatial locations are from: 1) on-screen digitizing with a georeferenced topographic or image background; or 2) GPS field collected positions.

procstep.procdesc: LWCF parcels feature class is derived from published Land Status Record System (LSRS) feature class: Surface Ownership and Table: Surface Ownership Fund.

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Unit funding amount received. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
All counties overlapping the project. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Project fund internal amount. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
The url for a photo of the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Purpose values from the fund type used.

edom.edomvd: Available to equalize the value of lands in a land exchange
Land and Water Conservation Funds available to acquire land to become part of the National Forest System
funds to purchase non-Federally owned lands that are located within a National Forest or Grassland boundary
Land and Water Conservation Funds available to acquire land for recreation access purposes and that will become part of the National Forest System
Available for program administration (salaries, expenses, due diligence costs)

attr.attrdef: Project fee acres. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
The calendar year in which the parcel came under or left the administrative jurisdiction of the Forest Service.
Name of the State containing the feature.
Administrative Forest name.
Project funding amount received with matching funds. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
The source OwnerParcel record's OwnerParcelID value. This is a system generated Globally Unique Identifier (GUID).
Source of the data.
Fair market value for the acquisition.
Total acres purchased with LWCF in unit. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
The case name.
Sub-unit containing feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Land Status Case ID is a unique control number created by an Oracle sequential number generator function.

U.S. Forest Service Region, consisting of Region 01 (Northern Region), Region 02 (Rocky Mountain Region), Region 03 (Southwestern Region), Region 04 (Intermountain Region), Region 05 (Pacific Southwest Region), Region 06 (Pacific Northwest Region), Region 08 (Southern Region), Region 09 (Eastern Region), and Region 10 (Alaska Region). There is no Region 07. Regions are listed on http://www.fs.fed.us/organization/506. Within this dataset, the region represents the Land Status Record System Production Regional schema from which data was derived.
Appropriations bill and title that the funds for the acquisition came from. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
GIS Acres of the project.
Management unit containing feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
A website url for more information regarding the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Photo credit for photo of the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Additional comments about feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Known issues related to the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Latitude of centroid of the polygon in geographic coordinate system GCS_North_American_1983 (WKID: 4269, Authority: EPSG).
Acquisition case fund code.
The fiscal year in which the parcel came under or left the administrative jurisdiction of the Forest Service.
Project site description. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Congressional district number containing the feature.

attrdomv.udom: Code indicating Congressional District, typically formatted as a 2 character state abbreviation followed by '-', then followed by 2 digits.

attr.attrdef: Does the project site have a description (Y/N)? The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Name of the County containing the feature.
The name of the Municipality containing the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Longitude of the centroid of the polygon in geographic coordinate system GCS_North_American_1983 (WKID: 4269, Authority: EPSG).
The official name of the National Forest (or other Administrative Area).
Name of non-profit partner. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Type of funding value; Actual, Estimate, Unknown.

Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF) programs include land management agencies that use LWCF funds to protect critical natural resources and outdoor recreation lands from development, to enhance public access for recreation, protect key wildlife habitat, and conserve land and water resources on federally designated and managed lands
Project site subtitle. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Method used for acquisition or disposal of land.
Unique identifier generated by Oracle sequence or SYS_GUID() function. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Sponsoring agency.

edom.edomvd: U.S. Forest Service is the sponsoring agency.

attr.attrdef: Privacy information pertaining to the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Acquisition amount
Project easement acres. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Project agreement/lease acres. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Name of the county.
Provider of the data.
Grant number assigned to the feature. The Forest Service is not responsible for populating this field.
Feature geometry.

The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible for verifying the limitations of the geospatial data and for using the data accordingly.
